title: Day 2 Lesson 2 ( Video )Thinking what to order in a restaurant
html:
Day 2 - Lesson 2 (continuation of Day 2 - Lesson 1)

なにを　ちゅうもん　するか　かんがえる = Thinking what to order

ばしょ (Location): レストラン　= Restaurant)

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): りゅうがくせい (study abroad student), だいがくせい (University student)


The new words you find in this lesson are:

この (kono) = this

その (sono) = that

とんかつ (tonkatsu) = pork cutlet

ぶたにく (butaniku) = pork meat

ぶた (buta) = pork 

にく (niku) = meat

ぎゅうにく (gyuuniku) = beef

ぎゅう (gyuu) = cow

じゃ (ja) = then

これにします (kore ni shimas) = I'll choose this one
